body.title: Engram tool: deposit grounding FACTUAL memory for confab-prone query space
body.result: GroundingEngram + deposit() with shape validation (anchor-keyword-in-narrative enforcement). Uses existing FACTUAL + metadata, no new schema. 15 tests. c4452da3.
body.description:
Build CC-side tool/CLI to deposit a FACTUAL memory shaped to close a grounding gap: structured narrative + anchor keywords tuned for retrievability. Targets capability/self-model/time-aware facts the LLM confabulates over. Uses existing cortex API, no new schema.

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/engram_tools/deposit_engram.py, tests/test_deposit_engram.py
**Design rules:** docs-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not, no-new-memory-schemas (use FACTUAL + metadata)
**Scope boundary:** IN — deposit via cortex API, enforce grounding-engram shape (narrative, anchor_keywords, optional parent CP). OUT — new memory_type, new DB columns, retrieval tuning.
**Test plan:** unit tests against test DB; verify deposited engram has required shape fields; verify it can be retrieved via traces_recent for anchor query.
